name: Tool From Library
description: Load a pre-defined ToolModel from ToolLibrary (e.g. 'cone', 'printing_tool', 'static_gripper', 'kinematic_gripper').

inputParameters.name: name
inputParameters.description: Name of the ToolLibrary classmethod to call (e.g. 'cone', 'printing_tool', 'static_gripper', 'static_gripper_small', 'kinematic_gripper').

inputParameters.name: load_geometry
inputParameters.description: Whether to load the tool's mesh geometry. Defaults to True when unwired.
